name: Mobile Legends: Bang Bang Live Player Count And Statistics
snippet: Mobile Legends: Bang Bang player count currently stands at 24.6 million monthly active users as of October 2025. This analysis covers the Mobile Legends: Bang Bang live player count, peak statistics, and regional distribution.

name: Moonton - Wikipedia
snippet: Mobile Legends: Bang Bang (often abbreviated MLBB) is a mobile multiplayer online battle arena (MOBA) game developed by Moonton. As of 2025, it has been reported to have over 1.5 billion registered users and around 110 million monthly active players.

name: MLBB Player Count (2025): How many people play the game?
snippet: As per MOONTON, the game has more than 1.465 billion downloads. Furthermore, the monthly active player count for MLBB stands at more than a staggering 110 million. Therefore, it’s one of the few mobile games that have managed to cross the 1 billion mark, showcasing its immense popularity.

name: About Us,-Develop games and fun for players all over the world
snippet: Mobile Legends: Bang Bang is an award-winning Multiplayer Online Battle Arena (MOBA) game available on the App Store and Google Play; it has over 1.5 billion installations and a monthly active user base of over 110 million players, as well as being among the top 10 most-played games in over 80 countries.

name: Mobile Legends: Bang Bang leads MOONTON Games' four-award
snippet: MOONTON Games dominated the GamingonPhone Awards 2025, winning four major titles including Mobile Game Developer of the Year and Mobile Esports Game of the Year for Mobile Legends: Bang Bang (MLBB).

name: Mobile Legends: Bang Bang Statistics 2026 - quantumrun.com
snippet: Mobile Legends: Bang Bang reached 51 million monthly active players in January 2026 — its highest count since launch — driven by the M7 World Championship. The game has now accumulated over 1.5 billion installations across 139 countries, making it the most-installed mobile MOBA in history.

name: Mobile Legends: Bang Bang Live Player Count and Statistics
